parameters.content:
## 🔬 Apex SDR Pipeline — Patent Outreach

**What this workflow does:**
Runs weekly → queries USPTO PatentsView for unassigned utility patents → enriches inventors via Apollo → scores confidence → routes to the correct Instantly outreach sequence → logs everything to Google Sheets.

**Flow:**
Schedule → Query PatentsView → Parse Patents → Write to Sheets → [Loop per patent] → Enrich via Apollo → Score Confidence → Route: [needs_review → Flag Sheet] [inventor_found → Instantly Inventor Sequence] [attorney_fallback → Enrich Attorney → Instantly Attorney Sequence] → Update Sheet Row

⚠️ Low-confidence records are flagged in the Sheet for manual review and are NEVER entered into an Instantly sequence automatically.

## ✅ SETUP CHECKLIST

1. **PatentsView API** — Register at patentsview.org/api/doc. No key required for basic use; add key header if rate-limited.
2. **Google Sheets** — Create a Sheet with columns: Patent Number | Inventor Name | Attorney Name | Summary | Location | Filing Date | Inventor Email | Inventor LinkedIn | Confidence Score | Route | Sequence | Status | Notes
   Copy the Sheet ID from the URL.
3. **Apollo API Key** — Found in Apollo Settings → API Keys.
4. **Instantly API Key** — Found in Instantly Settings → API.
5. **Calendly/Cal.com link** — Your booking page URL. Paste into the booking link constant in the Booking workflow.
6. **Swap all DEMO_ placeholders** in credentials before activating.
7. Set the Google Sheets Sheet ID in every Sheets node (search for DEMO_SHEET_ID).
8. Set your Instantly Campaign IDs for inventor and attorney sequences (search for DEMO_INVENTOR_CAMPAIGN_ID and DEMO_ATTORNEY_CAMPAIGN_ID).

## 📊 Confidence Scoring Logic

The enrichment confidence score (0–100) is calculated in the **Score Confidence** node:

| Signal | Points |
|---|---|
| Email found | +40 |
| Email verified by Apollo | +20 |
| LinkedIn URL found | +20 |
| Employment matches patent filing location | +10 |
| Apollo record has >3 data points | +10 |

**Thresholds:**
- Score ≥ 70 → `inventor_found` (enter inventor sequence)
- Score 40–69 → `attorney_fallback` (enrich attorney instead)
- Score < 40 → `needs_review` (flag in Sheet, skip sequences)

Adjust thresholds in the **Score Confidence** Code node to match acceptable sender reputation risk.

## ⚠️ Loop Architecture Note

The SplitInBatches node processes one patent at a time through the enrichment → routing → outreach chain.

This ensures:
- Apollo rate limits are respected (add a Wait node if needed)
- Each patent is independently enriched and routed
- A failure on one record does not block the rest

If Apollo rate limits become an issue, add a **Wait** node (2–3 seconds) between the Apollo call and the next loop iteration.

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.description: Fires every Monday at 8:00 AM. Starts the patent discovery run.

nodes.name: Query PatentsView API
nodes.description: Queries USPTO PatentsView for utility patents filed in the last 30 days. Returns up to 50 results. Filters for unassigned patents in Parse Patents node.

nodes.name: Parse Patents
nodes.description: Extracts 6 fields per patent: inventor name, attorney name, patent number, summary, location, filing date. Filters out assigned patents.

nodes.name: Any Patents Found?
nodes.description: If PatentsView returned no unassigned patents this week, stops the workflow cleanly. True = no results (stop). False = patents found (continue).

nodes.name: Write Patents to Sheets
nodes.description: Appends one row per patent to the Google Sheet. Columns: Patent Number, Inventor Name, Attorney Name, Summary, Location, Filing Date, Status.

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets — REPLACE WITH YOUR CREDENTIAL

nodes.name: Loop — One Patent at a Time
nodes.description: Processes each patent one at a time through enrichment and routing. Prevents Apollo rate limit errors.

nodes.name: Enrich Inventor via Apollo
nodes.description: Sends inventor first name, last name, and location to Apollo People Match API. Returns email, LinkedIn URL, and profile data if found.

nodes.name: Score Confidence
nodes.description: Scores enrichment confidence 0–100 based on email found (+40), email verified (+20), LinkedIn found (+20), rich profile (+10), location match (+10). Sets route: inventor_found / attorney_fallback / needs_review.

nodes.name: Route Lead
nodes.description: Routes each patent record based on confidence score: needs_review (score < 40) → flag in Sheet only. inventor_found (score ≥ 70) → inventor Instantly sequence. attorney_fallback (score 40–69) → enrich attorney then attorney sequence.

nodes.name: Flag for Manual Review
nodes.description: Updates the Sheet row for low-confidence records. Marks Status as 'Needs Manual Review'. These records are NOT entered into any Instantly sequence.

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets — REPLACE WITH YOUR CREDENTIAL

nodes.name: Add to Inventor Sequence
nodes.description: Adds the inventor to the Instantly inventor outreach campaign. Uses skip_if_in_workspace to prevent duplicate entries. Custom variables pass patent context for personalized messaging.

nodes.name: Enrich Attorney via Apollo
nodes.description: Fallback: enriches the patent attorney via Apollo when inventor confidence is too low. Uses attorney first/last name from the original patent data.

nodes.name: Parse Attorney Enrichment
nodes.description: Merges attorney Apollo data back onto the patent record. If attorney email found, routes to attorney sequence. If not, flags for manual review.

nodes.name: Attorney Email Found?
nodes.description: If Apollo found an attorney email → enter attorney sequence. If not → flag for manual review.

nodes.name: Add to Attorney Sequence
nodes.description: Adds the attorney to the Instantly attorney outreach campaign with a separate tone and cadence from the inventor sequence.

nodes.name: Update Sheet — Inventor Sequence
nodes.description: Updates the Sheet row after the inventor is entered into the Instantly sequence. Logs email, LinkedIn, confidence score, route, and status.

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets — REPLACE WITH YOUR CREDENTIAL

nodes.name: Update Sheet — Attorney Sequence
nodes.description: Updates the Sheet row after the attorney is entered into the Instantly sequence.

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets — REPLACE WITH YOUR CREDENTIAL

nodes.name: Flag Attorney — Needs Review
nodes.description: If even the attorney email could not be found, flags the row for manual review. Record is not entered into any sequence.

googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets — REPLACE WITH YOUR CREDENTIAL

parameters.content:
## 🔁 Loop continues here

After each branch completes (flag, inventor sequence, or attorney sequence), the loop cycles back to process the next patent.

All three branches reconnect to the SplitInBatches node via their respective output connections.
